QuizSubmission.title: Quiz Submission
QuizSubmission.description: A record of a user's quiz attempt.

userName.description: The name provided by the user.

totalQuestions.description: The total number of questions in the quiz.

answers.description: The detailed answers submitted by the user.

submittedAt.description: The time the quiz was completed.

/submissions/{submissionId}.description: Collection of quiz results submitted by users.
